name: Iterable
description: Iterable cross-channel growth marketing platform for customer communication

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Iterable
2. Go to Integrations → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Iterable → Integrations → API Keys → New API Key
